summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification for 10 listed PRs. No shared canonical was selected because the job is an inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster. Closed candidates are kept closed, open PRs are preserved for maintainer/review/proof follow-up, and the single hydrated security-sensitive linked ref is routed to central security handling.
